stemHtml: With regard to communication in a cockpit, we can say that…

options.a: communication is only effective if messages are kept short and sufficiently precise to limit their number
options.b: communication is always sufficiently automated to enable an activity with a high workload element to be carried out at the same time
options.c: all the characteristics of communication, namely output, duration, precision, clarity, etc. are stable and are not much affected by changes in workload
options.d: communication uses up resources, thus limiting the resources allocated to work in progress
